'''Lant Mining Corporation''' was the manufacturer of the [[Mobile Mining Barge I]]. It was the dominant economic force of [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]], having been chartered by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] to develop the entire sector's resources. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], LMC fell on hard times as Brak sector's mines began to play out. LMC was headquartered in the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]].

During the Galactic Civil War, the Lant Mining Corporation was divided into six different divisions: [[Mining (department)|Mining]], [[Refining]], [[Resource Discovery]], [[Research and Design]], [[Sales]], and [[Security Patrol]]. Each division was headed by an Executive, with all six reporting to the Chief Executive responsible for running the entire company.

LMC had contracts with several notable companies, including [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]], [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]], and [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]]. ''[[Hauler 10]]'' was an ore hauler used by the company.
